itinerary.mapNote: Drive from Kathmandu to Besisahar then Bhulbhule (840m). Start of Annapurna Circuit. Marsyangdi River valley.
Classic Annapurna Circuit teahouse approach. Subtropical forest. River crossings and suspension bridges.
District headquarters. Apple orchards. Annapurna II first visible. Manang Valley transition begins.
Upper Pisang base for the peak. Ancient monastery. Annapurna II, III and Pisang Peak dramatically framed.

itinerary.route: Upper Pisang to Pisang Peak Base Camp
itinerary.mapNote: Transition to tent camping above Upper Pisang. Glacier views. Equipment check and crampon fitting at camp.
Steep approach on snow and rock to high camp at 5000m. Fixed ropes on steeper sections. Night preparation.

itinerary.route: Summit Bid: High Camp → Summit → Upper Pisang
itinerary.mapNote: Alpine start 2am. South ridge to summit at 6091m. Annapurna II face fills the horizon. Descend to Upper Pisang.
Rejoin Annapurna Circuit to Manang. Rest day option or continue circuit to Thorong La.

waypoints.name: Pisang Peak Summit
waypoints.note: 6091m on the Annapurna Circuit. Annapurna II (7937m) directly adjacent. Two route options: south ridge (standard) and north ridge (technical).

waypoints.name: Upper Pisang
waypoints.note: Ancient Tibetan-influenced village. Monastery with centuries of history. Best viewpoint for Pisang Peak profile.

waypoints.name: Pisang Glacier
waypoints.note: Northeast-facing glacier on the peak's flank. Crampons from here to summit.

waypoints.name: Annapurna II
waypoints.note: Visible directly from Pisang Peak summit and approach. 7th highest in Nepal.
